svg.title: Smart dustbin internal electronics block diagram
svg.desc: Three-bin smart dustbin with STM32 controller, ESP32-CAM, sensors, servos, and edge cloud connectivity

g.text: 5V regulated (USB / Li-ion + boost converter) → 3.3V LDO for STM32 & sensors

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the PIR sensor work in the smart bin?')
sendPrompt('How does the user ultrasonic distance check work?')
sendPrompt('How does ESP32-CAM communicate with STM32?')
sendPrompt('What waste goes in the red bin?')
sendPrompt('How is fill level measured for bin 1?')
sendPrompt('What waste goes in the blue bin?')
sendPrompt('How is fill level measured for bin 2?')
sendPrompt('What waste goes in the green bin?')
sendPrompt('How is fill level measured for bin 3?')
sendPrompt('What does the edge platform do in this system?')

svg.text: Shared trigger PB8 → all 3 ultrasonics (multiplexed by echo pin selection)
